framework.name: Agentic JWT (A-JWT) Dual-Token Design
framework.description: Extends JWT with intent tokens (binding agent actions to cryptographically verifiable user intent) and delegation assertions (proving which downstream agent may execute a task). Adds agent identity via one-way checksum of prompt+tools+config, plus per-agent proof-of-possession keys.
framework.raw_quote: A-JWT carries an agent's identity as a one-way checksum hash derived from its prompt, tools and configuration and a chained delegation assertion to prove which downstream agent may execute a given task.

source.title: Agentic JWT: A Secure Delegation Protocol for Autonomous AI Agents
